parameters: *Speak to the man in the hut if you want to get naked again.
*Speak to the man in the hut if you want to get naked again.
There's a warm, glowing light. Fully restore the party?
The party's HP and MP has been fully restored!
I came for the hot spring! I heard the apes have calmed down
I wonder why they stopped attacking humans... Well, either way it
means we can use the hot spring for free! Lucky!
My, that pink-haired girl's so cute! ...Huh? You're a guy? No way!
I-I'll give you five Spirit Stones to come into the hot spring with
me! Don't worry, I won't do anything to you! Well? Well!?
Najezta catches the Tourist's eye. Accept her request?
Aw, come on! I wasn't going to do anything to you! Why!?
